description_long: This is a modern residential house set within a spacious, landscaped yard featuring a mix of green lawns, trees, and shrubs. The house itself is two stories tall, with a white exterior and a flat roof, complemented by a smaller, single-story structure with a gable roof nearby. The property includes a driveway, a swimming pool, and several outdoor seating and garden areas, all enclosed by a low fence. Large windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is marked by a path leading to a prominent front door, flanked by decorative landscaping and a small porch.
description: A modern two-story white house with a flat roof, landscaped yard, pool, and a secondary gable-roofed structure, surrounded by trees and gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and landscaped garden with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable-roofed secondary structure, pool area, and dense tree line.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, pool, and additional garden space with fencing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the flat-roofed main house, pool, and a clear view of the secondary structure and garden.
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent front door with a small porch, landscaped path, and decorative plantings
